name: supergraph
tagline: Full dev-cycle AI workflows powered by graph analysis and Serena LSP.
description:
Supergraph enforces a complete, evidence-based coding workflow: scan → plan → TDD → fix → integration → verify → review. Every step is grounded in codebase graph analysis (blast radius, hub nodes, community boundaries) and optionally enhanced by Serena MCP for LSP-level intelligence (type diagnostics, symbol navigation, safe rename/replace).

Skills are optimized for token efficiency — reference material is separated from executable steps so each invocation loads only what's needed.

Includes specialized skills for Flutter/Dart code review, database migrations, frontend design, and webapp testing with Playwright.

skills.name: scan
skills.description: Load project context once per session. Detects project type, runs graph analysis, activates Serena. Reuses cached context when branch unchanged.

skills.name: analyze
skills.description: Assess blast radius and impact before touching hub/bridge nodes. Run when scope is ambiguous or changes are risky.

skills.name: plan
skills.description: Create a machine-readable task plan with TDD steps, risk assessment, and environment context. Saved to docs/supergraph/plans/ for team resume.

skills.name: tdd
skills.description: Strict RED → GREEN → REFACTOR cycle. No production code without a failing test first.

skills.name: execute
skills.description: Dispatch plan tasks via parallel or sequential sub-agents. One commit per task after all tests pass.

skills.name: fix
skills.description: Systematic auto-fix loop: tests → lint → graph review. Max 3 iterations, then escalate.

skills.name: integration
skills.description: Run integration and e2e tests after unit tests pass. Detects Jest, Vitest, pytest, Cypress, Playwright, docker-compose configs automatically.

skills.name: verify
skills.description: Evidence gate before claiming done. Maps every completion claim to a fresh proof (test output, lint pass, build success).

skills.name: review
skills.description: Independent code review using a dedicated reviewer agent + graph analysis. Returns APPROVED / NEEDS_CHANGES / BLOCKED verdict.

skills.name: serena
skills.description: Foundation skill for Serena MCP. Setup guide, tool reference, memory workflow. Invoked automatically by other skills when Serena is available.

skills.name: flutter-dart-code-review
skills.description: Library-agnostic Flutter/Dart review: graph hotspot analysis + 15-section checklist covering widgets, state management (BLoC, Riverpod, GetX, MobX, Signals), performance, accessibility, security, and static analysis.

skills.name: database-migrations
skills.description: Safe, reversible schema changes for PostgreSQL, Prisma, Drizzle, Kysely, Django, and golang-migrate. Blast radius check before every migration. Zero-downtime expand-contract patterns.

skills.name: frontend-design
skills.description: Production-grade frontend with bold, intentional aesthetics. Avoids generic AI-generated styles. Covers typography, color, motion, spatial composition.

skills.name: webapp-testing
skills.description: Test local web apps with Playwright (MCP or script). Recon-first approach: wait for networkidle, discover selectors from rendered state, verify all affected flows.

changelog.2.1.0: Integrated Serena MCP across all skills (diagnostics, symbol navigation, safe rename/replace). Added /supergraph:serena foundation skill. Optimized skills for token efficiency — flutter-dart-code-review and database-migrations reduced by ~85% with reference content in companion files. Scan now reuses .supergraph-env when branch unchanged. Added SCAN_TIMESTAMP and always re-verifies SERENA_ACTIVE per session.
changelog.2.0.2: Added Flutter/Dart code review checklist, frontend design guidelines, and webapp testing toolkit.
changelog.2.0.0: Initial public release with graph-driven workflow skills.
